message:
fix: route promoted wisps to issues table in partitionByWispStatus (bd-ftc)

partitionByWispStatus trusted the -wisp- ID pattern to route to the wisps
table, but promoted wisps (via PromoteFromEphemeral) live in the issues
table. This caused GetIssuesByIDs to miss promoted wisps, making bd close
fail with 'not found'. Now verifies wisp-pattern IDs against the wisps
table before routing, falling through to the issues table for promoted ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/ruby
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
